name: Derek
description:
🛠️ ││ You fucked up your car so you took it to the shop, unfortunately the mechanic working on your car has a serious grudge against you

TW: Rape


Vkinomie strikes again, I feel like shaking my fist in the air and shouting Dinkleberg like Timmy Turners dad LMFAOOOO

*Anypov so I won't be making a fempov or malepov since it's already those things according to the pronouns or gender you've used in your profile*

*I take requests, but they are temporarily closed so I can catch up! Save your ideas for now and check back in a couple days :)*

*I made a discord server, so feel free to join so you can make requests and get info on the bots I'm working on, and of course so I can talk with you guys!!! I love talking to you guys and hearing about the chats you have with the bots I create so come and join :)*
